title: 5 Rupees (Dated Reverse)

obverse.description:
Dark green on pale green, yellow, and orange underprint; red serial number.
Mahatma Gandhi at right, Reserve Bank seal at lower right. 
Lion capital of Asoka column at lower left.
obverse.lettering:
भारतीय रिजर्व बैंक
RESERVE BANK OF INDIA
केन्द्रीय सरकार द्वारा प्रत्याभूत
GUARANTEED BY THE CENTRAL GOVERNMENT
5
पाँच रुपये
मैं धारक को पाँच रुपये अदा करने का बचन देता हूँ।
I PROMISE TO PAY THE BEARER THE SUM OF FIVE RUPEES
महात्मा गांधीㅤㅤMAHATMA GANDHI

reverse.description:
Dark green on pale green, yellow, and orange underprint
Scene of a farmer ploughing through is field with a tractor while sun is rising.
Five Rupees – Multilingual Depiction on Currency Note (15 Indian Languages – excluding Hindi and English)
•	Assamese: পাঁচ টকা
•	Bengali: পাঁচ টাকা
•	Gujarati: પાંચ રૂપિયા
•	Kannada: ಐದು ರೂಪಾಯಿ
•	Kashmiri: پانچ روپیہ
•	Konkani: पाच रुपये
•	Malayalam: അഞ്ച് രൂപ
•	Marathi: पाच रुपये
•	Nepali: पाँच रुपैयाँ
•	Oriya (Odia): ପାଞ୍ଚ ଟଙ୍କା
•	Punjabi (Gurmukhi): ਪੰਜ ਰੁਪਏ
•	Sanskrit: पञ्च रूप्यकाणि
•	Tamil: ஐந்து ரூபாய்
•	Telugu: ఐదు రూపాయలు
•	Urdu: پانچ روپیہ
reverse.lettering:
5 भारतीय रिजर्व बैंक 5

পাঁচ টকা
পাঁচ টাকা
પાંચ રૂપિયા
ಐದು ರೂಪಾಯಿಗಳು
پانٛژھ رۄپیہِ
पांच रुपया
അഞ്ചു രൂപ
पाच रुपये
पाँच रुपियाँ
ପାଞ୍ଚ ଟଙ୍କା
ਪੰਜ ਰੁਪਏ
पञ्चरूप्यकाणि
ஐந்து ரூபாய்
ఐదు రూపాయలు
پانچ روپیے

5 पाँच रुपये FIVE RUPEES

comments:
Date appears at bottom center of reverse.

Plate letter, if present, appears behind serial number.

Security thread:

Windowed into five sections on the obverse side, when seen under a backlight, the inscription of “RBI भारत” is repeated throughout.
